atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports breast scar discomfort following bilateral reduction mammoplasty.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports persistent discomfort with the scars from her bilateral reduction mammoplasty performed in October 2020.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient initially reported irritation with the scars.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient applied scar gel twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the scars were bothersome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any new chills, fever, nausea, or vomiting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports enjoying summertime activities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's family is doing well.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has not experienced any new back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals well-healed incisions with no signs of infection or redness in either breast.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The incisions appear widened, particularly on the left side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports subjective discomfort with the left scar.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Postoperative scarring following bilateral reduction mammoplasty.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes mederma scar gel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to use mederma scar gel twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment is planned in six months.
